figma.inspection_source: Figma Plugin API loaded-page registry, top-level frame list, cited node-id existence check, and annotations

inspection_method.rule: expected_pages.child_count and top-level inventories are taken from the Figma Plugin API after loading each page with await figma.setCurrentPageAsync(page), then reading page.children.length/page.children. Passive figma.root.children metadata is only the page registry; metadata XML/read tools are supporting evidence only because they may expand node subtrees or report lazy/unloaded child counts and must not redefine page-level child counts.

supporting_tool_limitations.observed_result: No-nodeId get_metadata listed only page 129:5215 UI for file MUOd9lctoEHASUStN3vUuK.
supporting_tool_limitations.authoritative_source: Figma Plugin API figma.root.children after loaded-page inspection
supporting_tool_limitations.rule: metadata page-list output is supporting evidence only and must not remove expected_pages or non-UI inventories.

coverage_policy.summary: Figma is product/design evidence, not the durable SSOT. A Figma node is covered only when it points to an owning domain/API/infrastructure/client boundary and a deterministic follow-up rule.
coverage_policy.top_down: When Figma changes product meaning, update the owning contracts policy or API DSL first, then regenerate IR/OpenAPI and downstream fixtures.
coverage_policy.bottom_up: When implementation or harness work finds a contradiction, record the local finding, escalate the owning SSOT, then update this coverage manifest.

nodes.name: 에이전트 만들어서 작업 시킬 수 있다
Ex AI - 온보딩 순서 변경 메모

verified_evidence_nodes.name: 템플릿 선택해서 에이전트 만들면 이름 중복 가능?
한 줄 설명 길 경우 한 줄 설명 길 경우 한 줄 설명 길 경우 한 줄 설명 길 경우 한 줄 설명 길 경우

non_ui_top_level_nodes.name: 데스크탑앱 온보딩
covered_facts: wireframe onboarding is absorbed by the UI page onboarding sections
desktop webview creates agents only through workspace-scoped fixture/direct-create generated paths
desktop app owns daemon launch trigger presentation and does not create a separate SaaS API

direction_loop.top_down: A new onboarding business rule in this wireframe updates ai-agent-policy and API DSL before client or daemon changes.
direction_loop.bottom_up: A desktop implementation constraint stays desktop/daemon-local unless it changes the SaaS read model or agent creation contract.

non_ui_top_level_nodes.name: macOS
covered_facts: macOS onboarding/install presentation is a desktop/client product surface
AI Agent API coverage still comes from device/runtime liveness and onboarding generated paths
no macOS-specific control-plane endpoint is created by this wireframe

direction_loop.top_down: A macOS product rule becomes an API/daemon contract only after policy names a new durable fact.
direction_loop.bottom_up: A macOS packaging or launch finding stays desktop/daemon-local unless it changes SaaS runtime liveness semantics.

non_ui_top_level_nodes.name: windows
covered_facts: Windows onboarding/install presentation is a desktop/client product surface
Windows waitlist or launch-notification actions remain outside the AI Agent generated API
no Windows-specific control-plane endpoint is created by this wireframe

direction_loop.top_down: A Windows product action needs a separate product/marketing or desktop SSOT before it becomes a generated API.
direction_loop.bottom_up: A Windows packaging or store-distribution finding stays outside AI Agent API unless it changes runtime liveness semantics.

non_ui_top_level_nodes.name: Ex AI - 온보딩 순서 변경 메모
covered_facts: Figma revised the onboarding explanation order to agent creation, runtime selection, then workspace selection
the first step is a client-local onboarding draft/selection state, not a durable workspace-less Agent record
durable v2 fixture/direct create still happens only after the client has selected workspace_id and runtime_id for final submit

direction_loop.top_down: A future onboarding order change updates ai-agent-policy and the API DSL before generated clients, control-plane, daemon, or desktop behavior changes.
direction_loop.bottom_up: If client implementation needs a persisted draft or workspace-less create, it must escalate to contracts instead of overloading the final create routes.

non_ui_top_level_nodes.name: 런타임
covered_facts: legacy runtime list wireframe is absorbed by the current UI runtime settings section
device/runtime liveness stays the durable read-model contract
runtime list rendering does not create a separate legacy endpoint

direction_loop.top_down: A revived runtime-list business rule from this legacy frame updates ai-agent-policy and API DSL before control-plane or client changes.
direction_loop.bottom_up: A control-plane or daemon runtime-liveness contradiction escalates to the current runtime settings entry instead of reviving this legacy frame as a second source.

non_ui_top_level_nodes.name: 런타임
covered_facts: expanded legacy runtime wireframe is absorbed by the current UI runtime settings section
daemon facts on a runtime settings surface are reached only through agent-bound daemon detail policy
legacy runtime frame variants do not create route forks

direction_loop.top_down: A revived runtime-detail rule from this legacy frame updates the current runtime settings policy/API entry first.
direction_loop.bottom_up: Implementation evidence about daemon detail stays on the agent-bound daemon contract unless product changes the current UI section.

non_ui_top_level_nodes.name: 에이전트
covered_facts: legacy agent list wireframe is absorbed by the current UI agent settings section
agent identity, lifecycle, timestamps, and runtime/model fields are owned by agent settings policy and API DSL
legacy agent list rendering does not create an alternate agent read model

direction_loop.top_down: A revived agent-list policy from this legacy frame updates the current agent settings policy/API entry first.
direction_loop.bottom_up: A client or control-plane list mismatch escalates to the current agent settings entry, not to a duplicate legacy list SSOT.

non_ui_top_level_nodes.name: 에이전트 수정
covered_facts: legacy agent edit wireframe is absorbed by the current UI agent settings section
editability still requires zero assigned tasks and the generated updateConfiguration operation
legacy edit form layout does not redefine field limits or RBAC

direction_loop.top_down: A revived edit-field rule from this legacy frame updates ai-agent-policy and the API DSL before generated-client changes.
direction_loop.bottom_up: A validation or RBAC mismatch changes control-plane behavior first, then escalates only if the shared policy meaning changes.

non_ui_top_level_nodes.name: 에이전트 추가
covered_facts: legacy agent add wireframe is absorbed by the current UI agent settings section
direct add uses ordinary agent create with workspace-scoped v2 semantics
legacy add form does not introduce a template entity or alternate create route

direction_loop.top_down: A revived create-field rule from this legacy frame updates the current agent settings create policy/API entry first.
direction_loop.bottom_up: A runtime selection or create validation finding escalates through the current create contract rather than this legacy frame.

non_ui_top_level_nodes.name: 데몬 상세
covered_facts: legacy daemon detail wireframe is absorbed by the current UI runtime settings section
daemon detail and lifecycle commands are agent-bound SaaS commands, not direct local frontend calls
daemon status streaming uses typed events rather than legacy screen copy

direction_loop.top_down: A revived daemon-control rule from this legacy frame updates the current runtime settings policy/API entry first.
direction_loop.bottom_up: A daemon execution limitation is recorded in daemon SSOT first and escalates only if client-facing SaaS command semantics change.

non_ui_top_level_nodes.name: 런타임 상세
covered_facts: legacy runtime detail wireframe is absorbed by the current UI runtime settings section
runtime detail is read from the device/runtime model and agent-bound daemon detail projection
runtime detail rendering does not create a standalone runtime-detail operation

direction_loop.top_down: A revived runtime-detail rule updates the current runtime settings contract before downstream code changes.
direction_loop.bottom_up: A read-model mismatch is fixed in control-plane/daemon projection and escalates only if shared runtime semantics change.

non_ui_top_level_nodes.name: 추가 기획 내용
covered_facts: legacy wireframe planning is resolved by the UI page 추가 기획 내용 section
task/subtask-only assignment scope remains the durable API boundary
non-task target surfaces still require a separate owning SSOT and generated operation

direction_loop.top_down: A revived planning sentence from this wireframe must update ai-agent-policy and API DSL before implementation.
direction_loop.bottom_up: A server/client mismatch in target scope escalates to the UI planning entry before local behavior diverges.

client_delivery_annotations.figma_label:
riido.aiAgent.events.stream
종류: SSE Stream
배경: threads 조회 결과에 active_stream이 있을 때만 연결해 진행 상태와 thread 갱신 이벤트를 받습니다.
client_delivery_annotations.resolution: The Figma handoff note now keeps the facade path on the first line, marks it as an SSE Stream, and explains that clients connect only when the task-thread cold collection returns an active_stream link.

client_delivery_annotations.figma_label:
riido.aiAgent.tasks.stop
종류: Mutation
배경: 작업 중인 Agent에게 중지 요청을 보냅니다. daemon은 이 요청을 읽어 provider 실행을 강제 중지합니다.
client_delivery_annotations.resolution: The Figma handoff note keeps the facade path on the first line, marks it as a Mutation, and explains the daemon/provider stop handoff.

client_delivery_annotation_inventory.background: 참여자 드롭다운에서 현재 task/subtask에 배정할 수 있는 Agent 목록을 조회합니다.
작업에 Agent를 참여자로 배정하고 daemon이 런타임으로 작업을 시작할 수 있는 서버 상태를 만듭니다.
참여자에서 Agent를 제거합니다. 진행 중이면 중지 요청/큐 해제 흐름으로 이어집니다.
작업의 완료/진행 중 Agent thread cold collection을 조회합니다. active_stream이 있으면 SSE로 이어집니다.
특정 thread_id에 다음 지시/답글을 추가하고 Agent 응답을 이어서 요청합니다.
호환용 댓글 제출 경로입니다. thread_id 없이 입력하면 서버가 적절한 thread 응답 흐름을 처리합니다.
threads 조회 결과에 active_stream이 있을 때만 연결해 진행 상태와 thread 갱신 이벤트를 받습니다.
작업 중인 Agent에게 중지 요청을 보냅니다. daemon은 이 요청을 읽어 provider 실행을 강제 중지합니다.
계정 소유 device에서 감지된 runtime 목록과 온라인/오프라인 상태를 조회합니다. 화면은 SaaS 값을 신뢰합니다.
Agent에 연결된 daemon/runtime 상세와 제어 가능 상태를 SaaS 기준으로 조회합니다.
SaaS에 daemon 중지 요청을 남깁니다. daemon은 요청을 읽은 뒤 스스로 종료합니다.
SaaS에 daemon 재시작 요청을 남깁니다. daemon은 polling으로 요청을 읽어 실행합니다.
리도/영실/홍도/지원처럼 제품이 제공하는 초기값 목록을 조회합니다. template entity가 아니라 fixture입니다.
선택한 fixture 값을 기반으로 일반 Agent를 생성합니다. fixture 자체를 생성하는 기능은 아닙니다.
직접 설정 화면에서 워크스페이스 안에 새 Agent를 생성합니다. 신규 v2 create는 workspace_id를 포함합니다.
AI Agent 설정/온보딩 초기 화면에 필요한 agent 요약, 권한, 기본 상태를 조회합니다.
할당 작업이 없는 Agent의 이름, 썸네일, 설명, 지침, 런타임, 모델, 공개 범위를 저장합니다.
Agent를 수정할 수 있는지 먼저 조회합니다. 할당된 작업이 있으면 저장/수정 UI는 막혀야 합니다.
Agent 삭제를 요청합니다. 진행/예약 중 작업은 서버 정책에 따라 중지 또는 큐 해제됩니다.

entries.name: 컴포넌트 참여자 드롭다운
covered_facts: visible agents are viewer-owned agents plus other users' public agents
agent ordering is owned-first, display-name ordered, then agent_id tied
task participant assignment and unassignment are command operations

direction_loop.top_down: A new participant dropdown business rule changes ai-agent-policy and the API DSL before control-plane/client code.
direction_loop.bottom_up: A frontend or server sorting mismatch escalates to the participant-dropdown fact in contracts before local patches diverge.

entries.name: 댓글 소통
covered_facts: the Figma comment label is projected as task-thread messages
cold thread collection is fetched before following an advertised active stream
daemon progress is batched and projected through typed stream events
stop is a SaaS command consumed later by daemon polling

direction_loop.top_down: A new thread state, message kind, or stop semantic changes the API DSL and stream event contract first.
direction_loop.bottom_up: A daemon batching or client stream-cost finding updates daemon/control-plane evidence, then contracts if thread meaning changes.

entries.name: image 14
entries.reason: Static image asset attached near task-thread evidence; it does not create vocabulary, API, daemon, or infra facts.

entries.name: 추가 기획 내용
covered_facts: only task/subtask surfaces receive AI Agent assignment
admin/owner/public/private visibility controls read and mutation behavior
device and runtime operations stay account-owned while agents are workspace-scoped

direction_loop.top_down: Planning text becomes canonical only after it lands in ai-agent-policy and the API DSL.
direction_loop.bottom_up: If implementation finds that a planning sentence is ambiguous, resolve the policy wording before adding new generated operations.

entries.name: 논의 필요
covered_facts: Figma node-id=162-23475 resolves fixture-created agent names as mutable and non-unique
fixture selection creates a normal agent and never creates a template entity
the control plane must not auto-suffix duplicate display names such as 리도(1); agent_id is the stable identity and tie-breaker
fixture-created agents follow normal agent editability, RBAC, update, and delete rules

direction_loop.top_down: A future onboarding fixture identity change updates ai-agent-policy and the API DSL before generated clients or server mocks change.
direction_loop.bottom_up: If control-plane, infra, or client implementation finds fixture-created agents need special handling, it must first prove the normal-agent policy is wrong here.

entries.name: image 13
entries.reason: Static menu-related image evidence; menu route responsibility is covered by node 156:19307.

entries.name: 메뉴바
covered_facts: AI Agent, runtime, and agent-management menu placement is a client route affordance
route rendering does not create a new daemon or infra fact

direction_loop.top_down: A route that needs data must point to an existing generated API path or create a policy/API change.
direction_loop.bottom_up: A client navigation mismatch remains client-local unless it changes the data contract.

entries.name: Group 6
entries.reason: Static grouping near menu evidence; no independent contract or implementation decision.

entries.name: 런타임 설정페이지
covered_facts: device/runtime liveness is read from SaaS
daemon detail and control are agent-bound SaaS commands
public agent daemon control is available to workspace members, private control is admin/owner-scoped
Figma node-id=129:17930 is an endpoint-looking runtime settings label, not a canonical base URL, generated path, or live host export

direction_loop.top_down: New daemon controls require contracts/API ownership before daemon or client behavior is added.
direction_loop.bottom_up: A daemon lifecycle limitation changes daemon SSOT first, then contracts only when the client-facing command semantics change.

entries.name: 데스크탑앱 온보딩-런타임 감지 O
covered_facts: desktop webview chooses a workspace before workspace-scoped agent creation
fixture selection creates an agent, not a template entity
direct setting maps to the normal agent create fields

direction_loop.top_down: Onboarding fixture or workspace-scoped creation changes contracts before control-plane/client implementation.
direction_loop.bottom_up: Desktop launch/runtime detection issues stay daemon or desktop-local unless they change the SaaS read model.

entries.name: 데스크탑앱 온보딩-런타임 감지 X
covered_facts: no selectable runtime is derived from device/runtime liveness
provider install-card rendering is client/product presentation
skipping runtime selection does not create a new AI Agent command

direction_loop.top_down: A new no-runtime server action requires a separate owning SSOT before API expansion.
direction_loop.bottom_up: Provider detection failures are daemon evidence unless they require new client-facing liveness fields.

entries.name: image 8
entries.reason: Static onboarding image evidence; onboarding runtime/fixture/direct-setting decisions are covered by nodes 164:30658 and 435:60050.

entries.name: Group 5
entries.reason: Static onboarding grouping; no independent SSOT decision.

entries.name: 웹 온보딩
covered_facts: auth, terms, invite, app download, and Windows waitlist are product/client/distribution surfaces
AI Agent API does not expose waitlist or marketing-consent operations

direction_loop.top_down: If web onboarding needs AI Agent data, route it through the existing generated AI Agent API or create a new SSOT.
direction_loop.bottom_up: Marketing/waitlist implementation work must not silently add AI Agent API fields.

entries.name: 런타임 설정페이지 엠티
covered_facts: empty state is derived from the device/runtime read model
provider install-card hover and Windows waitlist UI do not add AI Agent API operations

direction_loop.top_down: New empty-state data must extend the device/runtime read model through contracts.
direction_loop.bottom_up: Client presentation-only variants stay out of contracts unless they need typed server data.

entries.name: 에이전트 설정페이지
covered_facts: agent profile thumbnail, description, instruction, visibility, runtime, model, editability, and timestamps are contract fields
model candidates are runtime-scoped catalog records, not enum members
agent add availability is derived from selectable runtime data

direction_loop.top_down: New saved agent fields or mutation safety rules enter ai-agent-policy and API DSL first.
direction_loop.bottom_up: A control-plane validation or client usability contradiction escalates to the field owner before local divergence.
